brand.name: AURA OS
brand.tagline: The central operating system for multi-branch companies

landing.heroTitle: One HQ. Total visibility. Complete control. Smarter operations.
landing.heroSubtitle: AURA OS is the central operating system for companies that manage branches, agencies, teams, inventory, operations, and performance from one intelligent headquarters.
landing.feature1Body: Control every branch, agency, and team from a single intelligent headquarters with real-time visibility.
landing.feature2Body: Built-in workflows for restaurants, pharmacies, retail, fashion, beauty, auto parts, and furniture — with more industries coming.
landing.feature3Body: HQ decides exactly what each branch, agency, and employee can view, create, edit, approve, and export.

auth.loginTypeHint: HQ manages everything. Branches have limited access granted by HQ.

industries.supermarketDesc: Promotional campaigns, vendor management, returns, seasonal planning
industries.fashionDesc: Geographic assortment, sell-through analytics, discount approval, shipment allocation
industries.beautyDesc: Tester budgeting, expiry management, regional trends, slow-moving campaigns

industries.furnitureDesc: Logistics dispatch, custom manufacturing, showroom displays, frozen capital tracking

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.whatIsAuraOSAnswer: AURA OS is the central operating system for companies that manage multiple branches, agencies, teams, inventory, operations, and performance from one intelligent headquarters.
faq.whoIsAuraOSForAnswer: AURA OS is designed for multi-location businesses including restaurant chains, pharmacy networks, retail stores, fashion brands, beauty retailers, auto parts distributors, and furniture companies.
faq.canManageMultipleBranchesAnswer: Yes. AURA OS is built specifically for multi-branch management. HQ can create unlimited branches (based on plan), assign managers, and control permissions.
faq.canHQControlPermissionsAnswer: Absolutely. HQ has granular control over what each branch, agency, and employee can view, create, edit, approve, and export.
faq.differentIndustries: Can different industries use the system?
faq.differentIndustriesAnswer: Yes. AURA OS includes industry-specific workflows for restaurants, pharmacies, retail, fashion, beauty, auto parts, and furniture — with more coming.
faq.transferInventory: Can I transfer inventory between branches?
faq.transferInventoryAnswer: Yes. HQ can initiate and approve inventory transfers between branches. Industry-specific features like emergency rebalancing (pharmacy) and smart allocation (fashion) are built in.
faq.manageAgenciesAnswer: Yes. HQ can create agencies, assign them to regions, and control their permissions separately from branches.
faq.centralPricingAnswer: Yes. HQ can set global prices and apply branch-specific overrides. Auto parts and fashion industries get advanced matrix pricing.
faq.manageEmployeesAnswer: Yes. Create employees, assign them to branches or agencies, define roles with custom permissions, and track their tasks and performance.
faq.freeTrialAnswer: Yes. Your first month is completely free. After that, it's $100/month billed automatically. You'll receive a reminder 1 day before billing.
faq.subscriptionWorkAnswer: First month free, then $100/month automatically. Cancel anytime. Price shown in your selected currency.
faq.changeCurrencyAnswer: Yes. IQD (Iraqi Dinar) is the default, with 12 major Arab currencies supported including USD, SAR, AED, KWD, QAR, BHD, OMR, JOD, EGP, MAD, TND, DZD.
faq.arabicEnglish: Can I use Arabic and English?
faq.arabicEnglishAnswer: Yes. AURA OS is fully bilingual with RTL support for Arabic and LTR for English. Switch languages instantly from the header.
